word: G1968 - ἐπιπίπτω - epipíptō - ep-ee-pip'-to - Fall into

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to fall upon; to rush or press upon
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1909 and G4098; to embrace (with affection) or seize (with more or less violence; literally or figuratively): - fall into (on, upon), lie on, press upon.
